title: MoreTrees
description: A mod that adds new biomes, trees, wood types and items
body:
![Maple Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f921fabb3c16a1a1f6a5c71f4440f4d9405d560e.webp)
This mod adds new biomes, trees, wood types and items to your game. Perfect for building or if you just want to explore something new.

## Features:

**Biomes:**
- Broadleaf forest
- Maple forest

**Trees:**
- Chestnut tree
- Beech tree
- Maple tree

**Wood types:**
- Chestnut wood
- Beech wood
- Maple wood

_note: all wood types come with all its variants, for example: slabs, stairs, doors, fences..._

**Items:**
- Chestnut
- Roasted chestnut
- Maple sap
- Maple syrup
- Maple sap collector

## Dependencies:
Fabric API is required for Fabric
